entry.title: lissy93 closed an issue in twitter-sentiment-visualisation
entry.content:
lissy93 closed an issue in lissy93/twitter-sentiment-visualisation · June 25, 2026 07:36
Replace bower components with node modules #29
Bower is now deprecated, and needs to be removed. All bower libraries should now be installed with npm, and statically referenced
